Custom Solutions

Knowing is Only Half the Battle

That’s why all of our leadership training programs are founded on two core components: awareness and action. Participants first learn how their inner states and outward behaviors are creating certain perceptions and outcomes. Armed with these insights, they move into action with clear, authentic shifts that lead to better results, stronger relationships, and clearer communication.

Foundational Programs

Creating Executive Presence

Behavioral Shifts for Greater Clarity, Impact & Influence

Our Creating Executive Presence workshop focuses on the power of our behaviors to create and limit our executive presence. It is the first step towards becoming a more intentional and influential leader.

Participants “see themselves” - often for the first time - and gain crucial insights as to how they come across to others. Individual strengths and challenges are addressed to make way for clear and actionable steps for leading more confidently, delivering more compelling messages, building stronger relationships, and driving results.

The Creating Executive Presence workshop introduces leaders to the following proven proprietary tools:

  • Our 360-style assessment is an essential first step for participants to clearly see how they are perceived by others and the behaviors that lead to those perceptions. Measured along our Nine Dimensions™ of Executive Presence, the EPLA is completed prior to the workshop and provides context and actionable feedback for immediate and long term growth.

  • This research-based model for understanding, talking about, embodying, and expressing executive presence provides a tangible language for leaders and teams to own and improve upon their individual strengths and challenges.

  • Our five-step Message Architecture framework guides participants in developing clear, concise, and persuasive communications. Participants role-play delivering their message in a video presentation, followed by a constructive debrief with candid, supportive feedback from facilitators and peers.

BEST FOR:

Leaders at all levels, managers advancing to
higher roles, and individual contributors

FORMAT:

Offered in-person
or virtually

DURATION:

Two-day
workshops

CLASS SIZE:

6 - 16
participants

Schedule a Workshop

Sustaining Executive Presence

Deepened Awareness for Continued Action

The Sustaining Executive Presence workshop is designed for organizations truly committed to the on-going success of their leaders. Building from their Creating Executive Presence insights, participants go even deeper into the “backstage” – the motivations, perceptions, and behavioral styles that make them who they are.

Our holistic approach layers data from three additional assessments to provide participants with a comprehensive profile of their strengths, challenges, patterns, and blind spots. Exercises, discussion, and coaching culminates with each leader creating an achievable plan for authentic, continued improvement.

  • The DISC Assessment categorizes behavior into four primary styles: Dominance, Influence, Steadiness, and Conscientiousness; each style has distinct characteristics that affect how we interact with others and handle various situations. Behaviors that are getting in the way of desired results are pinpointed, and participants explore ways to adapt their behavior to different audiences and goals.

  • The Driving Forces Assessment delves into the core motivators that drive individual behavior, whether it’s a passion for knowledge, a desire for power, or the pursuit of practical results. By uncovering these intrinsic motivators, leaders gain a clear understanding of what propels them forward, both personally and professionally. They see how their core values influence decision-making and leadership style, driving more inspired and effective leadership strategies.

  • Arguably more important than IQ is EQ. This emotional intelligence assessment provides insights into five core factors: self awareness, self regulation, motivation, social awareness, and social regulation. By understanding these dimensions, leaders can better navigate interpersonal dynamics, manage stress, and make informed decisions under pressure. When layered with insights from DISC and 12 Driving Forces, these findings offer a comprehensive understanding of how to enhance leadership effectiveness and foster deeper connections.

BEST FOR:

Leaders who have completed
Creating Executive Presence

FORMAT:

Offered in-person
or virtually

DURATION:

Two-day
workshops

CLASS SIZE:

6 - 8
participants

Take the next step

Specialized Support

Leadership Coaching

Leadership is not a static quality - it evolves with experience and exposure to new challenges. In today’s fast-paced business world, leaders without ongoing support may struggle to grow, develop new blind spots, miss opportunities to innovate, or simply burn out. Without unbiased, honest feedback, leaders may continue making the same mistakes, unable to clearly see areas for improvement or how their actions are impacting others.

The consistent and committed support of a professional coach helps leaders to navigate their journey more confidently, and to grow through challenges. Ongoing coaching helps refine their skills, adapt to changes, strengthen relationships, and improve their decision-making. 

Our 1:1 and group coaching is designed to: 

  • Provide a neutral, safe space for reflection on mindset, decisions, and actions

  • Foster accountability through regular check-ins and evaluations

  • Enhance emotional intelligence, empathy, and interpersonal skills

  • Improve all forms of communication for greater effectiveness

  • Build resilience and confidence through a lens of ongoing learning and growth

BEST FOR:

Emerging leaders, Hi-potential employees, Executives & Senior leaders

FORMAT:

Offered in-person, virtually,
or a mix of both

DURATION:

6 - 12
months

CLASS SIZE:

1:1 or
small groups

Get Started

Message Mastery

Clear, actionable messages are the only way to ensure we effectively share a vision, describe the plan for getting there, and motivate others to get on board. Our Message Mastery workshop is all about how to take facts and figures and turn them into clear, resonant messages that connect and drive action. 

Built around our proven Message Architecture™ framework, participants learn to create messages that are clear, audience-focused, and actionable while maximizing their innate tools of self-expression.  We also address ways to tell a more compelling story, and how to create more powerful presentations. 

In order to truly see how they show up, leaders present a prepared message on camera, then review and refine their message with the help of direct, real-time feedback from peers and facilitators.

BEST FOR:

Anyone who wants to be a more compelling, influential communicator

FORMAT:

Offered in-person, virtually,
or a mix of both

DURATION:

One-day and two-day workshops

CLASS SIZE:

Up to 8
participants

What People Are Saying

  • "This was eye opening. I have been with the company for a long time and came in thinking I wouldn't learn anything that would be useful. I was 100% wrong. This is going to make a big impact on what I am trying to achieve with my team, and my organization as a whole."

  • "I was able to gain different perspectives about the way in which I show up. I found out that I'm hard on myself in some areas but overlook other areas I can improve on. More than that, I developed actionable next steps to enhance my executive presence."

  • "I really liked that the workshop focused on real life experiences and things that we can do today to make positive change. So often these types of courses are ambiguous and focus on abstract scenarios and I leave feeling like it was a waste of time. I have learned several valuable things."

  • "Awesome delivery. It is a powerful tool to evaluate and communicate the good and the bad -- a catalyst for more effective introspection, and a way to sustain gathering of feedback from my peers."

  • "The best workshop I have ever attended in my 30 year career. Amazing. Also, our facilitator did an outstanding job; she kept us mesmerized for the entire workshop."

  • "Combining the multiple avenues of feedback painted a clear and important picture for how I can improve. It was also GREAT to have a small, intimate group and such a safe space. Our facilitator expertly tied it all together and made the content very consumable and enjoyable."

  • "I feel the comfort of gaining and giving feedback again. We had a strong culture of that, and it has been forgotten. I am going to use this motivation to lead that charge within my organization and within my area of influence."

  • "This workshop really got me thinking about how I project myself to others. The small class size was very helpful and enabled us to stay engaged and get to know another. It allowed for intimate and very personalized feedback and conversation throughout."

  • "The worksop made me realize how important it is to seek feedback from others. Our perception of who we are is not necessarily what others think. I'll walk away now and create a feedback mechanism that will help me continue growing."

  • "The workshop was incredible! The Nine Dimensions are applicable ALL THE TIME, not just when giving a presentation or in a specific environment. My favorite thing was learning how to be a better leader and person, all of the time."

  • "Our facilitator did an OUTSTANDING job facilitating this class, with feedback that was extremely useful! One of the best classes I have ever taken. Highly recommend it!"

  • "This workshop gave me a chance to take a step back and evaluate my own presence. I was surprised at what I found that needed to be worked on. I gained knowledge about myself, particularly how others perceive me, and now know how my behavior can have a significant impact on this perception."

At Executive Presence, our comprehensive workshops and personalized coaching programs are designed to empower leaders and companies at every stage of growth, providing the transformative skills, insights, and strategies needed to navigate challenges and achieve success.
